texto: In this way unwittingly the Widow-to-Be is assuring her husband’s death—his doom. Even as she is fantasizing that he will be home for dinner she is assuring that he will never return home. How unwitting, all Widows-to-Be who imagine that they are doing the right thing, in innocence and ignorance!
